item.title: My First Pull Request
item.description:
I use Pelican and the pelican-bootstrap3 theme to built this site.

I made my first real pull request today in the form of a minor contribution to pelican-bootstrap3. I added a feature that allows you to add a series of images to the sidebar. The original intent was to allow me to add certification marks to my sidebar, which you can now see in action right here!

Props to @DandyDev for the pro tips.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond

item.title: AWS SysOps Administration - Associate
item.description: Last week I took the AWS SysOps Administrator - Associate test and passed with flying colours. Next step will be the Developer and then the DevOps certifications, both of which I hope to complete this year. I look forward to doing a lot more work in AWS in the future.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond

item.title: My First Kaggle Competition
item.description:
We are wrapping up the final week of MIT’s 15.071x “The Analytics Edge” course, delivered online via edX.org.

As part of the course I participated in my first Kaggle competition. I finished in 1406th place out of 2923 people with a Private leaderboard score of 0.88319, down from a public leaderboard score of 0.91792.

The mean score for all submissions was 0.8551523, median 0.90237, with a standard deviation of 0.09301734.

   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max.
 0.2500  0.7945  0.9024  0.8552  0.9204  0.9455

Not a great result, but a great learning experience. Many of the top finishers are sharing their code so I look forward to reviewing what they did. It is interesting to see some of the dramatic shifts in the top tier finishers.

The red and blue lines below represent my final and public leaderboard scores respectively.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond

item.title: The First Post
item.description:
I have proven to be absolutely terrible at this blogging business, but I’m giving it another whirl. This is intended to be some form of working life / professional experience related site. I suppose it is meant to be a “brag sheet”.

You will find more details about me on the About page, and a reasonably up-to-date resume here. More info can be gleaned from my other online presences, linked in the sidebar.

If the image on the right is still there when you read this, that’s one of my dogs, Nihla. She’s no longer with us, and she is sorely missed.
item.dc:creator: Mark E. Drummond
